postLists.content:
Dear Students,



We are pleased to share an exciting opportunity offered by ThinkStartup — the Young CEO Program, a 4-day entrepreneurship bootcamp hosted at Research & Innovation Park, IIT Delhi.



This program is ideal for students interested in innovation, entrepreneurship, and solving real-world problems.



Program Details:




  • Venue: IIT Delhi (R&I Park)

  • Duration: 4 Days

  • Timings: 9:30 AM – 4:30 PM



Available Batches:




  • 29 May – 1 June

  • 2 June – 5 June

  • 26 June – 29 June



Key Highlights:




  • Develop and present a business idea

  • Pitch in a Shark Tank–style finale

  • Learn from startup founders and industry experts

  • Certificate in Entrepreneurship (with TIDES IIT Roorkee)

  • Opportunity for recognition and portfolio building



Apply Here: https://bit.ly/K_NCR_MARCH26



Interested students are encouraged to explore this opportunity and apply at the earliest.
